channel.title: Shaurya · Log
channel.description: A personal activity log and curiosity journal.

item.title: Marching with rays
item.description: Build a raymarcher/raytracer with anti-aliasing, from scratch, within 168 lines of Java.

item.title: grok.....grok ?
item.description: What happens when you push a model past generalization? Does it know the rule, or just the data?
